title: Why Each Wrong Answer Is Tempting

distractors.whyTempting: Colonoscopy is definitive for lower GI bleed and students want to find the source
distractors.whyWrong: Emergent colonoscopy requires bowel prep and is not indicated in hemodynamically unstable patients

distractors.whyTempting: Nuclear medicine scan can localize occult bleeding and is a recognized diagnostic tool
distractors.whyWrong: Tagged RBC scan is for slow, ongoing bleeding — not the initial step in acute management

distractors.whyTempting: PPIs are first-line for upper GI bleeds and students may apply reflexively
distractors.whyWrong: IV PPI is indicated for upper GI bleed, and this patient has a lower GI bleed presentation

visual_contract.teaching_goal: Identify why students choose incorrect GI bleed interventions and the errors driving those choices
